generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamEnclosure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam enclosure of the thermal incubator system for biological sample containment"
]

instance ResistiveHeatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Resistive heatbed component for precise temperature control in the thermal incubator"
]

instance CoolingFan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cooling fan for air circulation within the thermal incubator enclosure"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B embedded controller for hardware interfacing in the thermal incubator"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment for precise thermal control of biological samples"
    base:contains StyrofoamEnclosure, ResistiveHeatbed, CoolingFan, RaspberryPi4ModelB
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message-oriented middleware enabling real-time data communication between digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, MonitoringService, OptimizationService, ControlService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for parameter optimization and calibration algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model representing physical dimensions of the thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for thermal dynamic behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance CyberPhysicalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Integrated cyber-physical model combining geometric and analytical aspects of the thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for reproducing and predicting physical twin behavior through simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalPrediction
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous safety and performance monitoring of the thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected, SafetyViolation, OptimalityViolation
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for algorithmic optimization of thermal incubator parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalSetpoint
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for supervisory control actions based on monitoring outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyCorrectiveAction, OptimalityCorrectiveAction
]

instance ThermalPrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted thermal state of the incubator from simulation results"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insight from monitoring system analysis"
]

instance SafetyViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety parameter violation detected in thermal incubator operation"
]

instance OptimalityViolation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimality parameter violation detected in thermal incubator operation"
]

instance OptimalSetpoint : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal temperature setpoint derived from optimization algorithms"
]

instance SafetyCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic corrective action for safety violations in thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalityCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual corrective action for optimality violations in thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies through a structure where sensor data is processed by calibration algorithms to update models of the cyber-physical system and environment, informing monitoring systems for safety and optimization checks, with human or algorithmic interventions triggered upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained via calibration algorithms adjusting parameters using sensor data to reflect Physical Twin behavior, with monitoring systems validating safety and optimality against predefined thresholds. Violation detection triggers corrective actions to the Physical Twin."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with system monitors checking for safe and optimal performance; when violations are detected, humans or algorithms initiate corrective actions to the physical twin."
]
